name: Hollyland Lark M1 Duo Wireless Microphone
description: Lark M1 lav microphone comes with a charging case to ensure non-stop battery life all day long. M1 microphone transmitter and receiver have a Type-C interface that supports working while charging at the same time. You no longer have to worry about low battery situations.

features.Key Features :: HearClear Noise Cancellation | Charge & Store Two-in-One | Easy to Use Plug and Play Design | Tiny & Light Design | Hi-Fi Sound Quality | Stable Connection | 650ft (200m) Transmission (LOS) | Wide Compatibility
features.What's in The Box :: 1x Charging case | 2x Transmitter | 1x Receiver | 2x Furry windshield | 1x 3.5mm TRS Patch cable | 1x 3.5mm TRS to TRRS Patch cable | 1x USB Cable | 1x Carrying pouch | 1x User Manual | 1x Kartu Garansi Resmi
